summary: P2 UAT: Payment Run WHT Support + Anomaly Feed Threshold Override UI. All features verified. Pytest: 203 passed (15 new), 11 skipped — no regressions. All UI flows working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features verified: (1) Payment Run WHT — page loads with KPI strip (Draft/Confirmed/Posted/Total), Create button works, step 1 dialog (date+bank) shows correctly, WHT column present in PaymentRunList.jsx line 340. Step 2 WHT table couldn't be visually tested since no approved payments in DB (expected). (2) ThresholdSettingsDialog — gear icon opens dialog, 3 scope tabs (Group/Brand/Outlet), 4 detector cards (sales_deviation/vendor_price_spike/vendor_leadtime/ap_cash_spike), fields editable, Save shows 'Threshold override disimpan' toast, Reset ke Default button visible+enabled, Override aktif status indicator working. All 3 API endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE /api/anomalies/thresholds) pass. 203/203 pytest pass.
